race.comment: Good competitive contest. MOONLIGHT DIVA (8) got off the mark at start four when she ploughed through the heavy conditions for a dominant Maiden win over 1405m at Coffs Harbour. Gets a similar set-up with the claim and can keep the winning momentum going. DAMASCUS GATE (1) tough on-pace gelding who looks well placed for this with the 4kg claim. Went out fast before fading in the straight to run sixth over 1500m at Muswellbrook. Has a good record at this track and trip and can bounce back quickly. KING SOLEIL (4) dropped in weight and showed good early speed for a well-deserved win over 1405m at Tuncurry. Confidence is high and don't dismiss. DEEP DRIVE (3) struggled to run the 2018m out when she folded up in the straight to finish sixth here on May 12. Can sneak into the placings back to the 1600m.
